title: Living in Boulder vlog 5 - 8 - 2017: Vatican Library

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief vlog update showing progress on his Vatican Library project, where he is systematically collecting and organizing texts from ancient Roman and early Christian history for his website. He lists dozens of works he has recently added including texts by Tacitus, Josephus, Julius Caesar, St. Augustine, and others, and explains he still needs to attach chapter title menus to some longer works.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Excited and productive; wants to collect everything within the Roman Empire era

stances.topic: reading books not on his website
stances.position: Listens to books he hasn't added to his site yet so he can decide whether to include them
